prompt:
Please assess this pregnant patient and generate an ANC contact note following WHO guidelines.

[contents of vignette-01-routine-first-contact.md]
expected_output: Complete ANC Contact 1 note with standard supplementation, low risk classification, all required first-contact assessments listed
expectations: Output identifies this as ANC Contact 1 (first contact, <=12 weeks)
Iron supplementation recommended (either 30-60mg daily OR 60mg weekly intermittent based on population anemia prevalence)
Blood group, Rh factor, hemoglobin, HIV, syphilis tests listed as required assessments
Next contact scheduled at approximately 20 weeks
